# Are you managing WordPress categories properly?

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-06-14 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 848

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Are you properly managing WordPress category pages?

Most website owners forget that category pages even exist. To
them, categories are just another WordPress feature they never
asked for.

Little did they know that people who visit category pages stay on
the site WAY longer than normal visitors.

They click more links. They explore more content. They're
genuinely interested in what you have to say.

I have created an actionable guide on how to properly manage
categories 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..B-2hXmB3e_T0cR_1YSI70AuKUwC_0mX7f2JkqhJb104 )
 in WordPress. It also has tips on deleting unused categories,
merging related categories, and more.

For your reference, WPBeginner only has 8 categories, and I have
been blogging for over 15 years now.

When it comes to categories, less is more :)

Quick Tip: Internal Links = More Engagement
-------------------------------------------

Want another easy way to keep visitors exploring your site?

Then you'll have to properly internal link within your site. With
proper interlinking, visitors will spend more time reading your
content and clicking through multiple pages instead of bouncing
after one article.

Here’s everything to know about internal linking 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..-Jok0fRNZV-RCoY1eF_iU1vZDEyVb0kBicuEf_aBRFQ )
.

Need WordPress Help Right Now?
------------------------------

If your site is broken, let us know... we can fix it, FAST.

When your WordPress site crashes, every minute counts. Maybe it's
a plugin conflict, a hacked site, or a mysterious error message.
Whatever the problem, you need it fixed immediately.

That's exactly what our emergency WordPress support team
delivers. We'll jump in to diagnose and fix your issue. Just
fast, expert help when you need it most.

Help is just a click away 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..LQejbJse39wn8A6ApAYpjCSvgVe8FZMUILXoQPeC0oY ).

Don't let a broken site ruin your day (or night).

Have a great rest of your week :)

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
